codeReview.summary: The feature correctly introduced shared returned metadata for list/detail display and added focused regression coverage, but the detail view still computes returned/resubmittable state from the stale incoming task object instead of the refreshed workflow history, so a returned task can lose its return banner and resubmit action once detail is opened from a surface that has not yet received canonical returned fields.

issues.description: `isReturnedTask`/`canResubmit` are derived from `props.task` only. When detail loads fresher workflow history via `reviewTaskGetWorkflow`, canonical returned state from that history is ignored for banner visibility and resubmit gating. A task opened from another surface with `status: 'draft'`, `currentNode: 'sj'`, but without `returnReason`/`reviewComment`/`workflowHistory` will still show the latest return reason in `latestReturnStep`, yet `isReturnedTask` remains false and the `再次提交` button never appears. This breaks the requirement that detail always show the latest returned state for the same task id.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker did not follow the skill's 'read-only lint on changed files (no --fix)' step and instead ran repository `npm run lint`, whose documented script is `eslint . --fix`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification lists `npm --prefix "/Volumes/DPC/work/plant-code/plant3d-web" run lint`; `.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md` step 5 says 'Read-only lint on changed files (no --fix)'; `.factory/library/environment.md` notes `npm run lint` is hardcoded to `eslint . --fix`.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, mission guidance, and commit `f1a95a2`. The list surface now consumes canonical returned metadata, but detail still bases returned/resubmittable state on stale props instead of the freshly loaded workflow history, so the feature does not fully satisfy the returned-task detail contract.
